title: Nursery Rhyme. CLIX. Songs.
content:
My maid Mary
        She minds her dairy,
                While I go a hoing and mowing each morn,
        Merrily run the reel
        And the little spinning wheel
                Whilst I am singing and mowing my corn.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CLIX. Songs."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
